summary: The diff implements all four requirements. MenuSection.tsx now uses chicken-tacos.dim_800x600.png for chicken tacos (REQ-1), chips-salsa.dim_800x600.png for chips & salsa (REQ-2), and quesadilla.dim_800x600.png for quesadillas (REQ-3). The frontend-file-summaries.txt confirms CateringSection retains the h-96 sm:h-[32rem] banner height introduced in Version 19 (REQ-4). No missing requirements or hallucinated features were detected.
